FR-06.title: Nursing Station
requirements: Patient list with vital signs display
acceptance_criteria: Handoff notes accessible to next shift

FR-16.title: Staff Scheduling
requirements: Shift scheduling for doctors and nurses

FR-01.title: Build Patient Registration API
FR-01.description: Create POST /api/patients (demographics, insurance, emergency contacts). Generate MRN. Document upload to HIPAA-compliant storage.

FR-01.title: Build Registration UI
FR-01.description: Create registration form with demographics, insurance cards scan/upload, emergency contact inputs, and MRN display on completion.

FR-02.title: Build Appointment API
FR-02.description: Create GET /api/doctors/:id/slots, POST /api/appointments, walk-in queue POST /api/queue/add. SMS/email confirmation.

FR-02.title: Build Appointment UI
FR-02.description: Create booking with department/doctor selection, calendar with available slots, and walk-in queue management screen.

FR-03.title: Build Admission API
FR-03.description: Create POST /api/admissions (patient, ward, room, bed, admitting_doctor). Bed management. Expected discharge tracking. Care plan CRUD.

FR-03.title: Build Admission UI
FR-03.description: Create admission form with bed selector (floor plan view), ward dashboard with occupancy, and care plan builder.

FR-04.title: Build EMR API
FR-04.description: Create comprehensive patient record: GET /api/patients/:id/emr. Problem list, allergy list, medication list, notes, results. HIPAA audit logging.

FR-04.title: Build EMR Viewer
FR-04.description: Create patient chart with tabs: summary, history, problems, allergies (red alerts), medications, results, notes. Timeline view.

FR-05.title: Build Order Entry API
FR-05.description: Create POST /api/orders (type: lab/imaging/medication). Clinical decision support rules engine. Order sets CRUD. Route to respective department.

FR-05.title: Build Order Entry UI
FR-05.description: Create order entry with search, medication form with dosage calculator, CDS alerts popup, and order set quick-select.

FR-06.title: Build Nursing API
FR-06.description: Create patient board endpoint. Medication admin recording. Nursing assessment CRUD. Shift handoff notes.

FR-06.title: Build Nursing Station UI
FR-06.description: Create patient board with vitals, med admin barcode scan and recording, assessment forms, and handoff note editor.

FR-07.title: Build Lab Module API
FR-07.description: Create lab order receiving. Sample tracking with barcode. Result entry and tech/pathologist validation. Critical value notification.

FR-07.title: Build Lab Module UI
FR-07.description: Create lab worklist, sample collection tracking, result entry grid, validation workflow, and critical value alert popup.

FR-08.title: Build Radiology API
FR-08.description: Create imaging order queue. PACS API integration. Report dictation and sign-off workflow. Result delivery notification.

FR-08.title: Build Radiology UI
FR-08.description: Create imaging worklist, PACS viewer embed, report editor with templates, and sign-off workflow.

FR-09.title: Build Pharmacy API
FR-09.description: Create prescription queue. Dispensing workflow. Drug-drug and drug-allergy interaction engine. Pharmacy inventory tracking.

FR-09.title: Build Pharmacy UI
FR-09.description: Create prescription queue, dispensing verification screen, interaction alerts, and medication inventory dashboard.

FR-10.title: Build Billing API
FR-10.description: Create charge capture per service. Insurance claim engine (837/835 EDI). Patient statement generation. Payment processing.

FR-10.title: Build Billing UI
FR-10.description: Create charge review, claim submission tracker, patient billing portal, and payment receipt generation.

FR-11.title: Build Surgery API
FR-11.description: Create OR scheduling with room assignment. Pre-op checklist. Team assignment and notification. Post-op note creation.

FR-11.title: Build Surgery UI
FR-11.description: Create OR schedule calendar, pre-op checklist with sign-offs, team assignment, and post-op note template.

FR-12.title: Build ED Module API
FR-12.description: Create triage assessment with ESI scoring. ED tracking board data. Rapid documentation. Disposition workflow (admit/discharge/transfer).

FR-12.title: Build ED Module UI
FR-12.description: Create triage form, ED tracking board with color-coded acuity, rapid assessment templates, and disposition buttons.

FR-13.title: Build Blood Bank API
FR-13.description: Create donor registration. Blood typing/cross-match results. Inventory per blood product. Transfusion request and approval workflow.

FR-13.title: Build Blood Bank UI
FR-13.description: Create donor registration, typing results entry, blood product inventory grid, and transfusion request form with cross-match check.

FR-14.title: Build Discharge API
FR-14.description: Create discharge summary template. Medication reconciliation. Follow-up appointment scheduling. Discharge instruction generation.

FR-14.title: Build Discharge UI
FR-14.description: Create discharge summary editor, medication reconciliation checklist, follow-up scheduler, and instruction printout.

FR-15.title: Build Equipment API
FR-15.description: Create equipment CRUD with location tracking. Maintenance scheduling. Assignment to departments. Calibration date tracking.

FR-15.title: Build Equipment UI
FR-15.description: Create equipment inventory, location map, maintenance schedule calendar, and calibration alerts.

FR-16.title: Build Staff Scheduling API
FR-16.description: Create shift CRUD. On-call rotation. Overtime tracking. Credential verification with license expiry alerts.

FR-16.title: Build Staff Schedule UI
FR-16.description: Create shift calendar, on-call roster, overtime summary, and credential expiry dashboard.

FR-17.title: Build Infection Control API
FR-17.description: Create case reporting, outbreak pattern detection, isolation room tracking, and antibiogram data management.

FR-17.title: Build IC Dashboard
FR-17.description: Create infection case form, outbreak alert map, isolation room board, and antibiogram table.

FR-18.title: Build Dietary API
FR-18.description: Create diet order processing. Meal plan generation per restrictions. Kitchen prep list. Delivery confirmation.

FR-18.title: Build Dietary UI
FR-18.description: Create diet order viewer, meal plan editor, kitchen prep list print, and delivery tracking board.

FR-19.title: Build Patient Portal API
FR-19.description: Create patient-facing endpoints for appointments, results, refill requests, secure messaging, and bill pay.

FR-19.title: Build Patient Portal
FR-19.description: Create portal with appointment calendar, lab results viewer, refill request form, messaging inbox, and bill pay.

FR-20.title: Build Clinical Dashboard API
FR-20.description: Create occupancy, department stats, critical alerts, and quality KPI endpoints with real-time data.

FR-20.title: Build Clinical Dashboard
FR-20.description: Create hospital overview with occupancy gauge, department stat cards, critical patient alert feed, and KPI charts.

FR-21.title: Build Supply Chain API
FR-21.description: Create supply catalog, purchase requisition workflow, vendor CRUD, and auto-reorder at stock threshold.

FR-21.title: Build Supply Chain UI
FR-21.description: Create supply catalog, requisition form with approval, vendor management, and stock level dashboard.

FR-22.title: Build Telehealth API
FR-22.description: Create video consultation endpoints. Remote monitoring data ingestion. E-prescription during call. Teleconsult billing code.

FR-22.title: Build Telehealth UI
FR-22.description: Create video call interface, remote data display panel, in-call prescription form, and teleconsult billing capture.

FR-23.title: Build Quality API
FR-23.description: Create incident reporting, RCA workflow, QI project tracking, and patient satisfaction survey system.

FR-23.title: Build Quality UI
FR-23.description: Create incident form, RCA template wizard, QI project board, and survey results dashboard.

FR-24.title: Build Insurance API
FR-24.description: Create eligibility check integration, pre-auth request workflow, claim status tracker, and denial appeal management.

FR-24.title: Build Insurance UI
FR-24.description: Create eligibility checker, pre-auth form, claim tracker, and denial management with appeal documentation.

FR-25.title: Build Referral API
FR-25.description: Create internal/external referral CRUD. Specialist availability. Status tracking. Secure document transfer.

FR-25.title: Build Referral UI
FR-25.description: Create referral form with specialist search, status tracker, and document sharing interface.

FR-26.title: Build Mortuary API
FR-26.description: Create deceased processing. Storage location tracking. Death certificate generation. Family notification workflow.

FR-26.title: Build Mortuary UI
FR-26.description: Create processing form, storage board, death certificate generator, and family contact interface.

FR-27.title: Build Research API
FR-27.description: Create protocol management, patient enrollment, research data forms, and IRB status tracking.

FR-27.title: Build Research UI
FR-27.description: Create protocol library, enrollment criteria matcher, data collection forms, and IRB tracker.

FR-28.title: Build BI and Reports API
FR-28.description: Create operational, financial, and clinical report endpoints. Custom report query builder with drill-down. Export PDF/CSV.

FR-28.title: Build Reports Center
FR-28.description: Create report library with operational, financial, clinical categories. Custom builder with dimensions and filters. Scheduled reports.

FR-29.title: Build Access Control System
FR-29.description: Create role-based permissions per department. MFA implementation. Comprehensive audit logging. Break-the-glass with justification and alert.

FR-29.title: Build Access Admin UI
FR-29.description: Create role management with department permissions, MFA setup, audit log viewer with search, and BTG alert dashboard.

FR-30.title: Build System Admin API
FR-30.description: Create user management CRUD. System config CRUD. Backup scheduler. Health monitoring endpoints.

FR-30.title: Build Admin Panel
FR-30.description: Create user management table, system settings editor, backup status and schedule, and health dashboard with uptime and errors.
